title: Minetale
body:
A resourcepack I made for a project that went nowhere, so don't expect anything groundbreaking. It's unfinished, with little probability of an update, but heres what I had done when the thing that this was made for got scraped.

Minetale overhauls minecraft's look to resemble the world of Undertale & Deltarune.
![Hometown inspired forest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/01c7ae089ed3415b1dc374420dfed2f60cc30e1f.png)

Most biomes have been & some structures now resemble areas from undertale. (Or at the very least, match it's art style.)
![Waterfall inspired lush cave](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cb732b512d6910fb96a2f0356d0ab339a58f4876_0.webp)

It even adds a Gaster skin to From the Fog.
![Snowdin inspired Snowy Tundra (With Gaster)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f3c8dec25f5535ba03c353cf622e3b903b91ece0.png)
To use the skin, select 'Custom 1' from From the Fog's config
